app.title: Submarine Commander WW2
app.subtitle: Playable naval career foundation
menu.choosePath: Choose your route across the Atlantic
splash.preparing: Preparing panels, languages and local save
setup.title: Create Commander
setup.name: Commander name
setup.validation: Choose name, nation and avatar to continue.
campaign.title: Campaign
campaign.subtitle: Historic World War II missions and free patrols
campaign.placeholder: Select a historical operation to open the briefing. The campaign is now structured around real wartime operations.
arsenal.title: Arsenal
arsenal.subtitle: Pick a hull, read stats and prepare upgrades
arsenal.note: In this build upgrades are still visual only. The structure is ready for the next phase.
crew.title: Crew
crew.subtitle: Build your team within budget
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Adjust language, audio and visual quality
settings.resetConfirm: All local progress will be deleted.
build.label: Build
nation.de.name: Germany
nation.uk.name: United Kingdom
nation.us.name: United States
crew.bio.otto: Disciplined veteran, ideal to keep the bridge calm.
crew.bio.emil: Specialist in echo and propeller noise across the North Atlantic.
crew.bio.franz: Solves failures under pressure with rare efficiency.
crew.bio.karl: Reduces route drift and improves patrol handling.
crew.bio.arthur: Methodical British officer, cold under fire.
crew.bio.thomas: Experienced lookout who spots convoys early.
crew.bio.hugh: Mechanic with strong damage control in rough seas.
crew.bio.edward: Chart and route reader, excellent for infiltration.
crew.bio.richard: Steady officer who boosts crew response.
crew.bio.james: Alert sonar specialist, great against submerged contacts.
crew.bio.luke: Repairs fast and stabilizes stressed engines.
mission.m1.title: Atlantic Opening
mission.m1.summary: An early-war Atlantic patrol focused on locating isolated merchants and returning without unnecessary exposure.
mission.m2.title: Convoy SC 7
mission.m2.summary: Track a slow Atlantic convoy, approach silently and pick the most vulnerable merchant before escorts tighten the screen.
mission.m3.title: Convoy HX 79
mission.m3.summary: Intercept HX 79 in the convoy corridor before the escort can organize a coordinated hunt.
mission.m4.title: Operation Berlin
mission.m4.summary: A long-range ocean hunt inspired by Operation Berlin, demanding patience and stealth on approach.
mission.m5.title: Malta Routes
mission.m5.summary: In the Mediterranean the escort reacts fast. Find a short attack window and vanish below the surface.
briefing.title: Briefing
briefing.subtitle: Plan the mission before deployment
briefing.objectiveSilent: Keep a low acoustic signature until the strike point.
briefing.objectiveStrike: Select the convoy's most valuable target.
upgrade.hull_steel_1.name: Reinforced steel I
upgrade.hull_steel_1.desc: Improves depth tolerance and structural silence.
upgrade.battery_silent_1.name: Silent batteries I
upgrade.engine_tuned_1.name: Tuned engine I
upgrade.sonar_array_1.name: Sonar array I
upgrade.torpedo_rack_1.name: Torpedo rack I
gameplay.title: Combat Room
gameplay.subtitle: Live navigation and attack systems
gameplay.hint: Line up the merchant in the periscope and fire a torpedo.
gameplay.hintTooDeep: Periscope unavailable at this depth. Rise to 20m or less.
gameplay.hintSuccess: Target neutralized. Return and complete the mission.
gameplay.hintMiss: Torpedo missed. Reposition and try again.
gameplay.hintEscortAlert: Escort alerted. Prepare the shot and pull back.
gameplay.hintEscortHunt: Destroyer hunting. Slow down and dive deeper.
mission.m6.title: Operation Drumbeat
mission.m6.summary: Attack shipping near the American coast during the opening phase of Drumbeat while Allied reaction grows.
mission.m7.title: Scattered PQ 17
mission.m7.summary: In Arctic waters the sea is hostile and the convoy is scattered. Identify exposed targets and escape surface response.
mission.m8.title: Torch Sea Lanes
mission.m8.summary: Aggressive patrol in crowded western Mediterranean lanes with destroyers reacting to the slightest noise.
mission.m9.title: Biscay Breakout
mission.m9.summary: Use open-water cover to cross the Bay of Biscay under constant hunting pressure and reconnaissance threat.
mission.m10.title: Convoy JW 55B
mission.m10.summary: Arctic weather cuts visibility, but the escort is relentless. Strike and escape before the enemy converges.
mission.m11.title: Marianas Patrol
mission.m11.summary: Patrol open Pacific waters to intercept logistics traffic under steadily stronger protection.
mission.m12.title: Leyte Route
mission.m12.operation: Interdiction on the approaches to Leyte
mission.m12.summary: Late-war Pacific mission with aggressive destroyers and a minimal firing window.
mission.m13.title: Sandbox Patrol
mission.m13.summary: Free mode for testing instruments, periscope, radar and escort response.
